jobs.label: fix
jobs.prompt:
Fix BUG-77632A8C: the idempotency gate blocks workflow reruns when only the agent slug changes.

The idempotency key is computed in Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/idempotency.py using a canonical hash of the full request body. When a user retries a spec with a different agent slug (e.g. auto/build → a pinned model), the payload hash differs but the workflow_id, labels, and prompts are identical — so this should be treated as a valid rerun, not a conflict.

Fix: exclude agent slug (and any other routing/model hints) from the idempotency hash. The key should be stable across agent changes for the same workflow content (name + job labels + prompt hashes). Look at how the normalized_request is assembled in Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/intake.py around line 179 to understand what fields feed the key, then strip agent/model fields from the hash input.

Do not change the key format or break existing idempotency semantics for genuinely duplicate submissions.
